title: Jobs page — drop color-coded Type chips and replace filter checkboxes with multi-select dropdowns

steps.description: Frontend: delete type_chip from both files; render Type cell as plain text; build components/multi_select.html macro + static/multi_select.js; replace Type and Status filter checkbox groups; run make css
Review S01 — scope discipline, type_chip fully removed, multi_select macro+JS quality, accessibility, CSS regenerated, query contract preserved
Tests: reproduction + regression tests in tests/dashboard/test_jobs_filter_ui.py — assert no legacy bg-* classes, assert data-multi-select markers present, assert multi-value type filter still works
Review S03 — semantic correctness over shape, tests would FAIL pre-fix, all three required scenarios covered, no live-DB connections
Global cross-step review — AC mapping (AC1-AC4), no leftover type_chip references, no leftover legacy color classes, query contract end-to-end, scope discipline, security
QV: Linting (ruff + node --check on dashboard JS)
QV: Browser verification — Type plain text, multi-select dropdowns for Type and Status, dropdown close on outside-click/Escape, no regressions on adjacent flows
